items.summary: Fix the category filter functionality on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) so that selecting 'All Hostels', 'Girls Only', 'Boys Only', or 'Co-Living' correctly filters the displayed hostel listings. Investigate whether the issue is in the CategoryFilter component state, the query hook (useGetHostelsByCategory vs useGetAllHostels), or the filtering logic applied to the hostel list, and ensure selecting each category tab shows only hostels matching that category (or all hostels for 'All').

Verify and fix the backend category filtering logic in backend/main.mo so that the getHostelsByCategory function (or equivalent) correctly matches and returns hostels whose category field equals the requested category string (e.g. 'Girls', 'Boys', 'Co-Living'). Ensure the category values stored in the seed data and returned by the backend exactly match the values expected by the frontend filter.
